'''Peekoine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. There were four [[Landslasher]]s located on the planet. Landslashers [[Landslasher-1|1]], [[Landslasher-2|2]], and [[Landslasher-3|3]] maintained the canals of the planet. [[Landslasher-4]] carved new canals. It was orbited by the space diner [[Mother's]]. Peekoine was home to to [[The Gutterwipes]], a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].
